creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Hi,

Is possible to use the free (CC-SA-BY/GFDL) release of french-dvorak kbdmap file into the FreeBSD base ?
This keymap, called "Bepo, ergonomic, Dvorak way" is already included in xorg, but I would to have in the FreeBSD console too.

It's licensed under CC-SA-BY/GFDL, have a community behind it (http://bepo.fr) and you can download the .kbd file here:
http://download.tuxfamily.org/dvorak/devel/fr-dvorak-bepo-kbdmap-1.0rc2.tgz

Regards,

Olivier
